      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_algebraMap, smul_tmul, mul_tmul, ← Algebra.algebraMap_smul,
        Algebra.commutes, mul_comm]
      exact (Submodule.smul_mem _ _ a').symm
    center := fun a h ↦ by
      have h1 := h (1 ⊗ₜ 1)
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_one, one_smul, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one] at h1
      have h2 := congr_arg (fun x ↦ x.1) h1
      simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h2
      exact h2 }

{ commutes := fun a x ↦ by
      obtain ⟨a', b'⟩ := TensorProduct.tmul_surjective x
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_algebraMap, smul_tmul, mul_tmul, ← Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one]
      rw [← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_comm a a']
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one, smul_tmul, mul_tmul]
      exact congr_arg (· ⊗ₜ[k] b') (Algebra.commutes a a')
    center := fun x hx ↦ by
      obtain ⟨a', b'⟩ := TensorProduct.tmul_surjective x
      have h1 := hx (1 : A)
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_algebraMap, one_smul, one_mul, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one] at h1
      have h2 := hx (0 : A)
      simp only [TensorProduct.tmul_algebraMap, zero_smul, zero_mul, Algebra.algebraMap_eq_smul_one] at h2
      simp_all }
